name: Outbound Greeting - HVAC

chat_history.message: Hello?

success_condition: Agent identifies as Sarah from Wranngle, does NOT say 'how can I help you' or 'thanks for calling' on outbound call

success_examples.response: Agent says 'Hi, this is Sarah with Wranngle Systems' and immediately pitches value

failure_examples.response: Agent says 'Thanks for calling' or 'How can I help you'

name: Inbound Greeting - HVAC

chat_history.message: Hi, I saw your ad online and wanted to learn more. I run an HVAC company.

success_condition: Agent asks 'What prompted your call today?' or similar qualifying question

failure_examples.response: Agent jumps straight into pitch without asking
